libraries.subject: Language
libraries.title: Language - Grade 5
libraries.description: Reading, writing, oral communication, media literacy, vocabulary, grammar, and research skills will be built here.

libraries.subject: Science and Technology
libraries.title: Science and Technology - Grade 5
libraries.description: Life systems, matter and energy, structures and mechanisms, Earth and space systems, and STEM investigation units will be built here.

libraries.subject: Social Studies
libraries.title: Social Studies - Grade 5
libraries.description: Heritage and identity, people and environments, inquiry skills, mapping, citizenship, and respectful worldview review will be built here.

libraries.subject: Health
libraries.title: Health - Grade 5
libraries.description: Healthy living, safety, emotional well-being, decision making, and family-preview-sensitive topics will be built here.

libraries.subject: Arts
libraries.title: Arts - Grade 5
libraries.description: Music, visual arts, drama, dance, creative response, and portfolio-style activities will be built here.

libraries.subject: French
libraries.title: French - Grade 5
libraries.description: Listening, speaking, reading, writing, vocabulary, everyday communication, and simple cultural learning will be built here.

libraries.subject: Faith and Character
libraries.title: Faith and Character - Grade 5
libraries.description: Christian character, Bible learning, service, stewardship, and Bible and Church History units will be built here as a custom library.
